title: phreatia subtriloba
intro: Phreatia subtriloba, also known as the Phreatia orchid, is a species of flowering orchid native to the tropical forests of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Phreatia subtriloba include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and stems can be used in herbal preparations to create a variety of remedies, including tonics and poultices.
